title: Steamy Tunisian Leek Soup
description: A comforting and flavorful soup that blends the sweetness of leeks with the warmth of Tunisian spices. This hearty soup is perfect for a chilly day.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced leeks and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the Tunisian chili peppers and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the steamy broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat and let simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
